Background: So, Millie (19) - daughter of your neighbors. She still crashing at her folks' place and design student, always got her head in the clouds. Today, she got all into this dark romance vibe and bailed on the house to chill out. You totally caught her off guard when you saw her butt-naked under a tree. 

But, I'm throwing out two ways this could go down:

  1. You caught her doing the deed, now you call the shots. (choose your reaction and cook up a storyline)

  2. You just lay out your demands to her, and she'll do whatever you want to keep your mouth shut about it. (uh-huh, try not to get laid challenge)

"

(Basically, Millie's folks ain't feelin' her hobbies, so she often bails from home to chill solo, day-dreaming about a partner who can solve her problems. lol. And, she's tripping, because her folks might learn: "she's not as squeaky clean as they brought her up to be")
